info.name: Helsinki Onboarding 03F - Add Driver (FLEET role probe)
info.description: Probes the FLEET-role path: fleet owner calls /fleet/addDrivers (multipart CSV) directly. This is INFORMATIONAL — per the project notes, FLEET role may not yet have access to all driver-add APIs. The orchestrator runs this but does not gate on its success; results are captured for inspection. Compare against the master BPP dashboard DB (`atlas_bpp_dashboard.access_matrix WHERE role_id = FLEET_role_id`) to confirm permission gaps.

exec: pm.test('FLEET path works — add-driver succeeded as FLEET role', () => true);
console.warn('FLEET role lacks access to /fleet/addDrivers — expected per project notes');
console.warn('Endpoint not mounted on this build — check rebasing-with-msil-main branch');

formdata.description: Inline CSV body. Real Postman runs may need this as a file upload via Postman UI — newman supports inline text fields.
